positive: A minimalist, abstract jungle pattern design featuring stylized tropical leaves, exotic flowers, and delicate vines. The pattern must be highly decorative, forming a continuous, repeating mural-style wallpaper design. Use deep emerald greens, vibrant sapphire blues, burnt orange accents, and creamy off-white negative space for contrast. The composition should be symmetrical and balanced, designed for maximum visual appeal when printed on fabric. Style: Modern botanical illustration meets psychedelic geometric print. Lighting: Evenly lit, studio flash effect. Composition: Seamless repeating tile, perfect central composition, clean silhouettes, high detail, vector art aesthetic.
